# End To End Delivery Plan

## Goal

Ship Gadgify as a complete family marketplace platform with secure multi-category commerce and strong operations.

## Phase 1: Stabilize Core

- Validate frontend and backend build health
- Resolve known delivery service/controller integration issues
- Confirm payment pending -> complete flow integrity
- Confirm role authorization paths for admin and super admin

## Phase 2: Complete Operational Backlog

- Delivery staff frontend dashboard and workflows
- Support ticket lifecycle and UI
- Returns and refunds workflow
- Inventory alerts and management screens

## Phase 3: Business Expansion

- Multi-category taxonomy quality checks
- Family vendor onboarding flow
- Category-specific filtering and merchandising
- Analytics dashboards for owner and admin

## Phase 4: Hardening

- Add tests across critical paths
- Add audit logging coverage for sensitive actions
- Improve observability, alerting, and backup strategy

## Exit Criteria

- Core purchase flow is stable and validated
- Operational workflows are complete and role-secured
- Documentation and prompts map to actual code paths
